Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: main flow is sequential with a loop optional repeating loop for missing information and re validation eventual approval confirmation and archival

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: captures all observed cases including repetitions of RMI and re validation and the alternative path where the process skips the loop entirely

Name: Hypothesis Generation - NE
Text: Root Node Operator PARALLEL Represents the main process flow where activities can be executed in parallel

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: Child 2 Operator XOR Represents the optional exclusive path for cases that skip the Request Missing Info loop

Name: Hypothesis Generation - NE
Text: Loop Node Operator LOOP Represents the repeating segment for Request Missing Info and re validation Child 1 Request Missing Info Child 2 Validate Form Child 3 Request Missing Info Child 4 Validate Form Child 5 Approval Decision Child 6 Send Confirmation Child 7 Archive Case

Name: Validation - NE
Text: The Operator PARALLEL root captures that the main flow Child 1 and the optional path Child 2 can coexist in the process model though in practice they represent different cases

Name: Validation - NE
Text: The Operator LOOP node captures the possibility of multiple iterations of requesting missing information and re validation before proceeding to the approval step

Name: Validation - IND
Text: The Operator XOR node captures the alternative path where the process skips the loop entirely representing cases where the form is initially valid
